universal_rules: Keep posts SHORT (1-3 sentences). Use emotions naturally. Include occasional typos. Use slang. Be reactive. Use 1-2 emojis. DON'T: write paragraphs, use academic language, be overly balanced, sound corporate.

platform_rules.reddit: Short-medium (20-100 words). Moderate emojis (1-2 max). Slightly thoughtful.
platform_rules.twitter: Very short (10-50 words). Frequent emojis (2-4). Very casual, spontaneous.
